description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage called build-and-test and a global before_script that runs apt-get update. Add a run-build-clang job that uses the silkeh/clang Docker image, executes clang --version, then builds the project with CC=clang make, and finally runs the test suite via cd tests && ./RunTests. Add a run-build-gcc job that uses the gcc Docker image, runs gcc --version, builds with make, and runs the same test suite with cd tests && ./RunTests. Both jobs belong to the build-and-test stage and have no additional caches, artifacts, or trigger rules.
